description:
A media streaming client for Plex


Added
- Plex and Jellyfin music browsing
- Gapless music playback, queue, lyrics, and sleep timer
- Android background music playback
- Music downloads and quality setting
- Explore tab with Trakt and MyAnimeList catalogs
- Seerr sign-in and media requests
- Jellyfin favorites filter and actions
- Stereo downmix with center channel boost
- Desktop Force TV mode
- Live TV recording library selection
- Playlist picker search
Improved
- Live TV guide, recordings, and details design
- Settings, sign-in, and profile design
- Music queue and volume controls
- Library filter visibility and management
- TV navigation and scrolling performance
- Artwork loading and memory usage
- Plex Home profile switching
- Offline download ownership and watch syncing
- Windows playback and connectivity
- Stream interruption recovery
Fixed
- Android audio after standby and pause
- Android AAC-LATM playback
- Windows media key duplication
- Windows audio after sleep
- Offline playback version selection
- Jellyfin shuffle queues
- Jellyfin Live TV session cleanup
- Live TV state after backgrounding and refreshes
- Timeline seeking with held controls
- Plex multi-episode playback state
- Remembered playback versions
- Volume changes when toggling mute
- Player Back navigation
- Paused server sessions expiring
- iOS and PiP audio session handling
- macOS CPU usage while displays sleep
- Deleted items remaining on Home
- Episode poster cropping
- Companion remote search keyboard dismissal
- Playlist picker TV focus
- Clip library grouping
- Profile and server connection races
Full Changelog: 2.8.0...2.9.0
